tagline: Your self-managing AI workforce — deployed and running in minutes.
description: SecondMind HQ is a hosted multi-agent command centre that gives you an autonomous AI workforce. Deploy a full fleet of specialized agents — system monitoring, research, design, alerting, growth, revenue tracking, and more — to your own infrastructure or ours. Manage everything from a single real-time dashboard with API access for deep integration. The agents collaborate, self-coordinate, and escalate only when they need you.

core_deliverable.summary: A fully managed, self-coordinating AI agent fleet with dashboard and API access
components: REST API access for all agent operations and data
Hosted deployment (customer infrastructure or SecondMind cloud)
Persistent agent memory and context across sessions

features.name: Multi-Agent Fleet
features.description: Specialized agents for system monitoring, web research, design, alert watching, growth, revenue tracking, email, social media, and more — all working together.

features.name: Command Centre Dashboard
features.description: Real-time web dashboard showing agent status, task queues, system health, revenue metrics, and alerts in one unified view.

features.name: Full API Access
features.description: REST API to trigger agents, query data, manage tasks, and integrate SecondMind HQ into your existing workflows and tools.

features.name: Self-Managing Coordination
features.description: Agents autonomously prioritize, delegate, and collaborate. No manual orchestration required — they manage themselves.

features.name: Flexible Deployment
features.description: Deploy to SecondMind cloud for zero-ops, or to your own infrastructure for full data sovereignty.

features.name: Persistent Memory
features.description: Agents retain context across sessions — they learn your systems, preferences, and priorities over time.

features.name: Alert & Escalation Engine
features.description: Intelligent alerting that filters noise. Agents handle routine issues autonomously and escalate only what matters.

features.name: Revenue & Growth Automation
features.description: Built-in agents for campaign management, social posting, email sequences, and revenue tracking.

pricing_tiers.name: Solo
features: Standard agent fleet (sysmon, researcher, alertwatch, designer, emailagent)
pricing_tiers.target: Solo founders, indie hackers, and freelancers who want AI-powered ops without hiring.

pricing_tiers.name: Team
pricing_tiers.target: Small teams and startups that need an autonomous ops layer across their stack.

pricing_tiers.name: Enterprise
features: Unlimited custom agents (built to your spec)
pricing_tiers.target: Mid-market and enterprise teams needing custom AI workforce with compliance, SLA, and dedicated support.

target_customer_segments.pain_point: Wearing too many hats — need ops, monitoring, research, and marketing but can't afford to hire.
target_customer_segments.value_prop: A team of AI agents that handle the work you can't get to, for less than the cost of one SaaS tool.

target_customer_segments.pain_point: Moving fast but drowning in operational overhead — alerts, content, monitoring, and admin tasks pile up.
target_customer_segments.value_prop: Deploy a self-managing ops team in minutes. Your agents handle the busywork so your humans ship product.

target_customer_segments.pain_point: Need 24/7 coverage and intelligent automation but don't have the headcount or budget for an SRE team.
target_customer_segments.value_prop: Always-on agents that monitor, alert, research, and act — with escalation to humans only when it matters.

target_customer_segments.pain_point: Exploring AI workforce augmentation with compliance, security, and SLA requirements.
target_customer_segments.value_prop: Custom agent fleet on your infrastructure, with enterprise controls, audit logging, and guaranteed uptime.

competitive_positioning: Unlike single-purpose AI tools, SecondMind HQ is a complete workforce — multiple specialized agents that coordinate autonomously. Not a chatbot. Not a copilot. A team.
